title: spiraea sorbifolia var. lindleyana
intro: Spiraea sorbifolia var. lindleyana, also known as the Chinese Spirea, is a plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to China. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Spiraea sorbifolia var. lindleyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Spiraea sorbifolia var. lindleyana are typically made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be steeped in hot water to make a tea or decoction.
